data.name: XXX Pussy House
data.detailed_description:
XXX Pussy House is a late-night tale about reviving a broken brothel and reuniting the girls who once called it home.

You stumble into a ruined house and meet an “old woman” guarding its ashes. Room by room, the walls remember their warmth: laughter returns to the bar, footsteps echo on the stairs, and familiar voices find each other again. Playful reunions turn to teasing banter, glances grow longer, and the night starts to purr.

What you’ll live through

  • Restoration, not just renovation. Reopen rooms and watch how each one breathes differently when its girl comes back.

  • The bar after hours. Enchanted cocktails double the fun, spark lucky bursts, cut prices, and make the house hum.

  • Six fantasies, one family. A mischievous tiefling, a gentle forest elf, a competitive half-orc trainer, a romantic dryad, a contemplative sea muse, and the mysterious kitsune madam.

  • Intimate rewards as you warm each heroine up — moments made for lingering.

  • A reunion chain of VN-style dialogues where the girls greet, tease and slowly melt back into each other’s lives… until the house leads you to the madam’s true face.

Gameplay in one breath:
Two tight loops — a relaxed clicker for heat and currency, and simple management for rooms, floors and bar buffs.
Unwind in the clicker; restore rooms and unlock new girls.

Juicy, colorful art. Urban-fantasy nights. A home rebuilt by touch.

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7,8,10,11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-4460 / AMD FX-630
  • 記憶體: 2000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 / AMD Radeon R7 260
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7,8,10,11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-4460 / AMD FX-630
  • 記憶體: 2000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 / AMD Radeon R7 260
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
